items.title: iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.description_zh: 来自世界各地的公开 IPTV 频道集合

items.title: teslamate
items.description: A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla 🚘 [main maintainer=@JakobLichterfeld]
items.description_zh: 特斯拉的自托管数据记录器 🚘 [主要维护者=@JakobLichterfeld]

items.title: Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.description_zh: 让您的人工智能代理有一双能够看到整个互联网的眼睛。阅读和搜索 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书 — 一个 CLI，零 API 费用。

items.title: chatwoot
items.description: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬
items.description_zh: 开源实时聊天、电子邮件支持、全渠道服务台。 Intercom、Zendesk、Salesforce Service Cloud 等的替代品。🔥💬

items.title: hello-algo
items.description: 《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现
items.description_zh: 《Hello算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、英语、日本语，提供Python、Java、C++、C、C#、JS、Go、Swift、Rust、Ruby、Kotlin、TS、Dart等代码实现

items.title: freeCodeCamp
items.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.
items.description_zh: freeCodeCamp.org 的开源代码库和课程。免费学习数学、编程和计算机科学。

items.title: cua
items.description: Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).
items.description_zh: 计算机使用代理的开源基础设施。用于训练和评估可控制完整桌面（macOS、Linux、Windows）的 AI 代理的沙箱、SDK 和基准测试。

items.title: coding-interview-university
items.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.
items.description_zh: 成为软件工程师的完整计算机科学研究计划。

items.title: ai-engineering-from-scratch
items.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
items.description_zh: 学习它。建造它。寄给别人。

items.title: server
items.description: Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.
items.description_zh: 音乐助手是一款免费的开源媒体库管理器，可连接到您的流媒体服务和各种连接的扬声器。服务器是跳动的心脏，是音乐助手的核心，必须在始终在线的设备上运行，例如 Raspberry Pi、NAS 或 Intel NUC 等。

items.title: IPTV
items.description: M3U Playlist for free TV channels
items.description_zh: 免费电视频道的 M3U 播放列表

items.title: Win11Debloat
items.description: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.
items.description_zh: 一个简单、轻量级的 PowerShell 脚本，允许您删除预安装的应用程序、禁用遥测以及执行各种其他更改以整理和自定义您的 Windows 体验。 Win11Debloat 适用于 Windows 10 和 Windows 11。

items.title: Self-Hosting-Guide
items.description: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.
items.description_zh: 自托管指南。了解有关您或您的组织本地托管（本地和私有 Web 服务器）和管理软件应用程序的所有信息。包括云、LLM、WireGuard、自动化、家庭助理和网络。
